Notes: Kaitlin Clifford tied a career-high with 17 points and Artie Williams scored
a game-high of 18 points.  New Paltz secures second place in the SUNYAC
Tournament and will host Plattsburgh Tuesday February 24 at 7:00 p.m.
Game.Officials: Robert Hatler,  Carlos E. Guzman,  George Tully
